titleStmt.title: SII 41.237: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 237. (A.R. No. 456 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the east wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Sale of the dēvadāna village of Meduvūr in Naḍuvin malai-Perumūr-nāḍu by the trustees and the ūravar of Paḻayanūr to Cheluvappiḷḷai Chittiramēḻikkōn son of a temple woman (dēvaraṭiyāḷ) called Aṇḍamuṟa nimirnta-māṇikkam. It is said the lands were lying fallow as the irrigation tank had breached. The lands were made tax-free.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravarttikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyan muṭittalaiyuṅ ko
ṇṭaruḷina cikulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 3 vatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭa
lattu maṇaviṟkoṭṭattu menmalaip paḻaiyaṉūr ṉāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkā
ṭuṭaiyār koyilil kannināyaṟṟup patināṟāṉ tiyati cevvāykkiḻamaiyum pūrvapakṣat
tu tratiyaiyum peṟṟa cittirai nāḷ Ammaiyappaṉ tirumaṇṭapattu Iruntu Āticaṇṭeśvaranaruḷāl Uṭai
yār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār koyil tānattomum Uḷḷūrt tanimāheśvararum tiruppaḻaiyanūruromum
Āticaṇṭeśvara pramāṇak kaiyyeḻuttu Ikkoyiṟ tevaṭiyāḷ nāyakappiḷḷaiyārāna Aṇṭamuṟa nimirnta
māṇikkattinmakaṉ celvappiḷḷaikku cittarameḻic coḻakonukku yittevar tevatānam naṭuvinmalaip
perumūrnāṭṭu metuvūr viṟṟukkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūreri yuṭaintu kaḻaniyuṅ kāṭeḻun
tupāḻkiṭakkaiyināle Ikkoyiṟ tānattārum tanimāheśvararum tiruppaḻaiyanūrruromum Itevarte
var tevatānametuvūr nilakkāṇittiṭṭu variceyiṟuttu Epperpaṭṭa kaṭamai kuṭimai pokkaṟukkak kaṭavatākavu
ṅ(k) kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūr kiḻpāṟkellai yetirilicoḻa maṭappuṟamāṉa caṟkkarainallūrellai
kku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkkellai kāṭṭellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai mullaivāy Ellaikku
k kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai tiruppaḻaiyanūrammai nācciyār maṭappuṟamāna kāraikkālammaiyār viḷākat
tu Ellaikkut teṟkku Innāṟpāṟkellaiyuṭppaṭṭa kāṭuṭpaṭa nañce puñce Uṇṇilamoḻiviṉṟi Iv
vūr tirumuka kalveṭṭuppaṭiye Ūraṭaṅkalāka viṟṟukkuṭuttuk kaikkoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟpaḻaṅkācu Iru
pattaiñcum kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār ko
yiṟtāṉattomum Uḷḷūrttaṉimāheśvararum tiruppaḻaiyanūruromum Āticaṇṭeśvara pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭu
ttom Aruḷāl Ikkoyiṟ koyiṟkaṇakku perumpūturuṭaiyāṉ Aruḷāḷan vaṭukan Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 41.237 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
